title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 528.540 - Majority of commissioners may act
text:
528.540.  Majority of commissioners may act. — A majority of the commissioners, in all cases, shall have power to act; and all sales made under the foregoing provisions shall be made by the sheriff of the county in which such lands, tenements or hereditaments, or any portion of them, may be situate, or by a special commissioner appointed by the court for that purpose.
(RSMo 1939 § 1762) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1598; 1919 § 2046; 1909 § 2610
